title: Forget Me Not
writer: John B. Clymer, Henry Roberts Symonds
actors: Irene Hunt, Will Machin, Bessie Love
plot: Young mother Mary Gordoon is too poor to take care of her infant daughter, Ann, and leaves the child at an orphanage. Ann grows up with a crippled leg in the orphanage, and has fallen in love with a fellow orphan, Jimmy.
